name: chr22_22q11_21_LCR22A_breakpoint_cluster
description: LCR22-A, the proximal breakpoint of the canonical 22q11.21 DiGeorge/VCFS deletion. ~700 kb SD block at chr22:18.6-19.3 Mb (GRCh38) containing PRODH/GGT/DGCR6/USP18/BCRP paralogs in complex inverted+direct mosaic. Most NAHR events that produce the 3 Mb DGS deletion initiate within LCR22-A; LCR22-A is itself >99% identical between haplotypes in its core but harbors structural polymorphism at the kilobase scale.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of 6-12 modules (BCRL, GGT, USP18, BCRP, PRODH-paralog) in mixed orientation; haplotype-level rearrangement common.
